---
title: 'Dear Her 02/21/2020'
date: '2020-02-23T07:45:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6202086397057084323'
blogger_filename: '/2020/02/dear-her-02212020.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<div class="WordSection1">  <p class="MsoNormal">Hello Lover.<o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal">I started writing earlier but I had to get to work. Then I realized I can send this from my desk. I haven&#8217;t met you yet. I don&#8217;t know your name or face. But my heart knows you exist. God started talking to me about you less than one month   after Flavia died. Just to prime the pump, I guess, as it&#8217;s been almost two years coming up soon. I&#8217;m at 20 months in a few days. A few thoughts today.  <o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal">1. You&#8217;re out there:<o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal">Back in November 2019, two separate individuals gave me the exact same prophetic word. Heather (and Joseph) and Karla (and Matthew) both said on separate occasions without being in earshot of each other. &#8220;God has a wife for you&#8221;.  <o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal">That may sound small, but for me it was an irritant at first. I had given up on that dream/desire. My kids aren&#8217;t really open to the idea and I need to focus on them. Plus, if I think it will never happen I can settle into counterfeits   easier. <o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal">But as I prayed, Daddy said that I had resigned myself to let that dream die in a negative way. Instead, I should hold it up before Him in meditation and prayer. But not chase after it. Be open, pursue dates, ask people out, but be ever   mindful that you&#8217;re out there somewhere. <o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal">I started praying for you. Not very consistently, I must admit. My prayer is more like one theologian said &#8220;I rarely pray for more than five minutes but I rarely go five minutes without praying&#8221;. You&#8217;ve been in my mind often, but now you   occupy a larger and larger percentage of my heart. So much so, that you&#8217;ve begun to crowd out the other so called &#8220;opportunities&#8221;. There&#8217;s a flirtatious young lady that sits next to me. She wants nothing more than a toy for an hour that goes home. It&#8217;s tempting&#8230;   or&#8230; it would have been months ago, or last year. It&#8217;s not anymore. Because you&#8217;ve grown so big in my heart that you&#8217;ve crowded out counterfeits.<o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal">I&#8217;ve begun to feel &#8220;betrothed&#8221; to you. So when I&#8217;ve had more offers to take a bedroom for a night, I turn them down. I don&#8217;t want them, because you&#8217;re out there, somewhere. I thought I found you last year and it turned out to be a counterfeit.   In hindsight, I can see it clearly. So now I&#8217;m being cautious. If I come across as guarded, it&#8217;s because I want to make sure you are you before I give my heart away again.  <o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal">I embrace openness, transparency, NO HIDING&#8230; but after the experiences of my life, my inner vault, the secret door, the more vulnerable place is locked tight. I will hand you that key in trepidation and fear and excitement, hoping you will   honor it&#8230; terrified I don&#8217;t deserve for you to honor it. <o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal">Also, I am wondering what you&#8217;re like and how I&#8217;ll know you:<o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal">There are things I hope, things I know, and things I&#8217;m pretty sure about. There are lists I&#8217;ve made that I threw away. There are new lists I&#8217;ve been making in my head that I should probably write down. The new lists are lists about Character,   not Characteristics. <o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal">I hope you will:<o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent:-.25in;mso-list:l0 level1 lfo1"><![if !supportLists]><span style="font-family:Symbol"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">&middot;<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;  </span></span></span><![endif]><b>Love God</b>: Intimate with Jesus, The Father, and The Holy Spirit but slightly irreligious. More dedicated to Jesus than me, ready to say no to me and yes to Him when needed. But not so &#8220;churchy&#8221; that we can&#8217;t be real with   each other, even in our darkest moments. I saw a couple worshiping together in church, I want to be that couple. Together, on our knees, hands held high together, praising God.  <o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent:-.25in;mso-list:l0 level1 lfo1"><![if !supportLists]><span style="font-family:Symbol"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">&middot;<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;  </span></span></span><![endif]><b>Have Boundaries</b>: Well versed in Boundaries, including having read Dr. Clouds books, maybe even a Bounderies.me member. I didn&#8217;t realize that so many of us humans were boundary injured until I started dating. It&#8217;s taken   a lot of work to develop boundaries myself. This one is kind of a pre-requisite to even have you show up on my radar, if you don&#8217;t have this, we probably won&#8217;t get to the point you read this list.<o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent:-.25in;mso-list:l0 level1 lfo1"><![if !supportLists]><span style="font-family:Symbol"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">&middot;<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;  </span></span></span><![endif]><b>Be Quirky</b>: Weird, Different. Unusual. Not &#8220;normal&#8221;. Atypical.  <o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent:-.25in;mso-list:l0 level1 lfo1"><![if !supportLists]><span style="font-family:Symbol"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">&middot;<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;  </span></span></span><![endif]><b>Be Safe</b>: Deeply committed to being safe space for me and others. The type of person who can co-counsel with me, which means (while counseling) listening more than speaking, but speaking with authority and clarity and wisdom   when needed. <o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent:-.25in;mso-list:l0 level1 lfo1"><![if !supportLists]><span style="font-family:Symbol"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">&middot;<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;  </span></span></span><![endif]><b>Be Relational</b>: Provide a human relational perspective to balance my heady concepts/ideas personality.<o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent:-.25in;mso-list:l0 level1 lfo1"><![if !supportLists]><span style="font-family:Symbol"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">&middot;<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;  </span></span></span><![endif]><b>Be Family Oriented</b>: Passionate about your children and my children, and keep pointing my heart back to them. See what I don&#8217;t see.  <o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent:-.25in;mso-list:l0 level1 lfo1"><![if !supportLists]><span style="font-family:Symbol"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">&middot;<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;  </span></span></span><![endif]><b>Be Healthy</b>: Dedicated to health, good food, and longevity without being a Gym Rat. Enjoy Whole Foods (Whole30, Keto, Paleo, Whole) without being so black and white that you can&#8217;t eat a snickers once in a while. I hope you&#8217;ll   enjoy cooking together.<o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent:-.25in;mso-list:l0 level1 lfo1"><![if !supportLists]><span style="font-family:Symbol"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">&middot;<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;  </span></span></span><![endif]><b>Modest but Attractive</b>: Have a beauty of soul that is the center and source of your attractiveness. Able to dress up or dress down, but usually use very little makeup, unless it&#8217;s for cosplay. *please like cosplay* I don&#8217;t   know if I should write this down, but if you have a few tattoos, maybe even a foot tattoo, I&#8217;d be happy.  <span style="font-family:Wingdings">J</span> <o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent:-.25in;mso-list:l0 level1 lfo1"><![if !supportLists]><span style="font-family:Symbol"><span style="mso-list:Ignore">&middot;<span style="font:7.0pt &quot;Times New Roman&quot;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;  </span></span></span><![endif]><b>Enjoy Sex</b>: I mean enjoy it. Not be addicted to it but enjoy it, plan to enjoy it often. Be free and un-inhibited in it. Open to new things (within the confines of safe Boundaries, and only involving the two of us). Tantric   experiences are on my list to try with the lover of my soul. Although I am afraid, I am trusting that if God brought us together than we will be fit in all the right ways in this area too.  <o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal">I&#8217;m sure there&#8217;s more. But I think that&#8217;s the essence of it.  <span style="font-family:Wingdings">J</span> <o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal">I love you,<o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal">Future Husband, Darrell Wolfe<o:p></o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>  </div>  <br clear="both">  ______________________________________________________________________<BR>  The information contained in this e-mail message and any attachments may be privileged and confidential. If the reader of this message is not the intended recipient or an agent responsible for delivering it to the intended recipient, you are hereby notified that any review, dissemination, distribution or copying of this communication is strictly prohibited. If you have received this communication in error, please notify the sender immediately by replying to this e-mail and delete the message and any attachments from your computer.<BR>  ______________________________________________________________________<BR>
